title: What an american thinks about slovakia - bike touring may 20th 2010

transcript.text: Hello, I realized that I didn't do a video. What an American thinks about Slovakia. Well, I don't have a whole lot to say because I wasn't there for very long.

I spent one night in a tent, and then one night in a hotel, and then that was it. And then the next night after that, it was in Hungary. So that was like one full day of riding, and then the end of one day, the very end of one day, and then pretty much most of the next day, riding.
But Slovakia, the northern part of Slovakia is very hilly. I saw lots of signs for ski resorts around there. I think just to the west, to the east of where I was riding was a ski resort.
It was like, and it looked like, I looked, I saw the ski mount, it looked like a pretty badass ski resort too, like wave in the mountains, and pretty big, so.
And it was really rainy, and the cold, and the rain was really cold, and it seemed, but I mean, it was raining all over, so I don't know if it was a rainy place.

But as far as the Slovakians, one thing, I mean, you notice random things about different places, but one thing I kind of noticed about Slovakians is that the girls are really hot, and that they're really flirtatious, like really smiley, like.
So and like cute so I like the girls in slovakia like the girl at the hotel and the new ones at
